summary: COMPARISON: LEFT z-plane with RED dashed branch cut + BLUE/PURPLE arrow rotating from θ=0 to 4π (color changes at 2π to mark sheet 2). RIGHT w = √z plane with arrow at angle θ/2 and radius √1.5 — traces upper half on sheet 1, lower half on sheet 2. Both have always_redraw arrows + color-segmented trails. Live panel shows θ, w, current sheet.
